name: job-description-ai-mcp
description: MCP server for job description ai. Features generate job description, analyze requirements, suggest salary range. From MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_job_description
tools.description: Generate a complete job description for a given role and level.

tools.name: analyze_requirements
tools.description: Analyze a job description text and extract structured requirements.

tools.name: suggest_salary_range
tools.description: Suggest a competitive salary range based on role, level, and region.

tools.name: check_bias
tools.description: Check a job description for biased or non-inclusive language and suggest alternatives.
